untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of external catalysts (earnings surprises, dividend distributions, exuberance/news events) which cannot be expressed using only price-based technical indicators. The gap detection itself is translatable, but the causal mechanism and success rates are market-regime-dependent and author-silent on key parameters (success rates, failure rates, volume trends, throwback percentages).
translation_notes: Translated the core gap pattern detection logic: uptrend gap (prev_high < low) and downtrend gap (prev_low > high). Exit conditions set as simple reversals since author provided no guidance. Gap trading typically requires fundamental catalyst confirmation and regime context beyond technical indicators. Consider adding volume confirmation (vol_ratio_20) and trend context (sma_50) in live implementation.
